basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iima.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate/Master's degree or Ph.D. in Geoinformatics/Remote Sensing/GIS, Data Science/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Science, Earth Sciences/Environmental Science, Urban Planning/Spatial Planning, Engineering, Applied Mathematics, Statistics or related quantitative disciplines
qualification.details: Postgraduate/Master's degree or Ph.D. in Geoinformatics/Remote Sensing/GIS, Data Science/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Science, Earth Sciences/Environmental Science, Urban Planning/Spatial Planning, Engineering, Applied Mathematics, Statistics or related quantitative disciplines

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate/Master's degree or Ph.D. in Geoinformatics/Remote Sensing/GIS, Data Science/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Science, Earth Sciences/Environmental Science, Urban Planning/Spatial Planning, Engineering, Applied Mathematics, Statistics or related quantitative disciplines

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate positions is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Associate post in the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Postgraduate/Master's degree or Ph.D. in specific disciplines such as Geoinformatics, Data Science, Earth Sciences, Urban Planning, Engineering, Applied Mathematics, or Statistics.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIM Ahmedabad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) is located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Full Time job position as a Research Associate at IIM Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any restrictions on the domicile of the candidates. Eligible candidates from all regions can apply, provided they meet the educational and other criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
